title: In the Name of the Son
overview: When Elisabeth, a woman of faith, host of a radio show on a Catholic radio station, devoted to her family and the suffering of the world, is confronted with the pedophilia of priests and the suicide of her son, belief gives way to rage and to violence.

trailers.title: AU NOM DU FILS Bande Annonce (Comédie Noire - 2014)
